name: Possible Brute Force Attempt
notes: This rule detects adversary performing brute force.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Invalid Password during Kerberos Pre-Authentication
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Invalid Password at Login, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Invalid Password during Kerberos Pre-Authentication
when at least 10 events are seen with the same Username in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 10 events are seen with the same Username in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Possible Brute Force Attempt on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Invalid Password at Login, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Invalid Password during Kerberos Pre-Authentication
AND when at least 10 events are seen with the same Username in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Possible Brute Force Attempt
Event description: Detects adversary performing brute force.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
